extraction_reasoning: The only litigation summary shown contains a “Cases against our Company” direct-tax row with 1 case and ₹1.41 million; there are no criminal or statutory/regulatory enforcement rows, and no “By ...” rows to count. The quantified group matter against the company is therefore ₹1.41 million, or ₹0.141 crore, with no subsidiary matter disclosed. Contingent liabilities use the stated consolidated Total of ₹4,849.21 million as of June 30, 2022, equal to ₹484.921 crore; the source unit is million. The company-wide concentration figures are for Fiscal 2022, a full fiscal year, using revenue from operations: top 5 customers are not disclosed, while top 10 customers account for 99.71%; the auditor matter is expressly an emphasis of matter, not a modified opinion.
